race.comment: NOJONKMAIL (1) just ran into one better here on debut and will have derived a stack of benefit from that race day experience. Hoop Lerena was in the irons on that occasion and sticks today. Rates the testing material against this line-up. BOLD ENVOY (2) wasn't too far off them at Gold Coast first time at the races and should find this assignment a touch easier. Capable of featuring despite the sticky draw. ROYAL DIAMOND (11) hit the frame over this distance range last time out and gets in well at the weights with the 2kg claim. Top three aspirations. ANDERS KISS (16) maps well from the low draw and should give backers a sight up on speed. POWER OF ANGELINE (14) has gotten better with each career effort and looks to be improving with racing. Presents some value for the exotics.
